title: Better Moss Carpet Overhang
description: A moss carpet overhang that works with any resource pack, rotates randomly and more!
body:
Better Moss Carpet Overhang is a texture pack that adds a little overhang on the edges off moss carpets to other blocks underneath, making your building a lot more aesthetic.\
You may have seen other ones, but this one is better!\
Features:
- Works with any resource pack — this pack will work with any resource pack as long as that resource pack doesn't modify models, or you will have to put this over the top for it to work.
- Optimized — this pack has a few optimizations for the model of the overhang to increase performance.
- Doesn't modify the item — this pack doesn't modify the item model of the moss carpet, whilst some do, making it look quite ugly in the inventory.
- Blends seamlessly when over a moss block — this pack makes the overhang blend in seamlessly when it is over a moss block, stopping ugliness.
- Random rotations for a cleaner look — this pack randomly rotates the moss carpet to stop ugly grid patterns and give a cleaner look.

![Better Moss Carpet Overhang](https://i.postimg.cc/ydRnjg08/2024-12-16-18-21-14.png)\
I hope you enjoy!
